title: Emotional Debt
summary: Another day, another post about burnout. But really, I'm thinking more about that point that precedes it, the stall that–left unchecked–turns into a nosedive. The good thing is you do have an opportunity to pull back up, you always do, but it gets harder the longer you wait. The
